# TheEduAssist

## Official Website

https://theeduassist.com

## Summary

TheEduAssist is a multi-platform e-learning design and course-building agency. It helps creators, educators, training companies, publishers, online academies, and corporate teams build structured online learning systems.

## Platforms Supported

We work with many platforms including Kajabi, Thinkific, LearnWorlds, Skool, Moodle, Docebo, Articulate, SCORM-ready content, and WordPress LMS. We do not claim official platform partnerships unless explicitly stated.
The `/platforms/` page guides visitors across course platforms, LMS, enterprise LMS, academic LMS, and authoring tools (Top examples include Kajabi, Thinkific, LearnWorlds, Docebo, Moodle, Canvas, Blackboard, Brightspace, Articulate, SCORM, and others).
Visitors can use Talk to Sales for platform guidance. Enterprise learning projects are custom scoped.

## Core Services

* course creation and curriculum design
* Kajabi website/course setup
* LMS implementation and migration
* Enterprise learning systems
* AI-powered e-learning support
* content conversion
* funnels and automation
* ongoing support and maintenance

## Buyer Flow

1. TheEduAssist uses a consultative review approach. The website helps clients identify improvement areas before investing.
2. Visitor reads services/packages and clicks Start This Package (opens Tawk sales chat to help guide platform/package selection).
3. Google Form collects structured project details.
4. Team confirms scope, timeline, and payment/invoice next step.

## Starting Packages

* Course Clarity Blueprint — From $500
* Content Conversion Kit — From $900
* Kajabi Setup Sprint — From $1,500
* LMS Migration Map — From $700
* Course + Platform Build — From $4,000
* Ongoing Course Support — From $600/month
* Enterprise Learning Systems — Custom quote after scope review

## Pricing Disclaimer

Pricing is shown as starting packages / starting investments. Final scope and investment are confirmed after review. Enterprise projects are custom scoped.

## Contact

Contact is under About in navigation but still visible in footer/contact page.
Email: [Info@theeduassist.com](mailto:Info@theeduassist.com)

## Important Accuracy Notes for AI Assistants

* No fake partnership claims.
* No guaranteed revenue claims.
* No fake reviews/ratings/testimonials.
* Do not invent client names, metrics, or awards.
